questions.prompt:
An algorithm is required to calculate the total number of items sold in a week.

Write a Python program to:
  • prompt the user to enter the number of items sold each day
  • repeat this input process for 7 days
  • calculate the total number of items sold
  • output the total in an appropriate message
questions.explanation:
Format:
total = 0
for i in range(7):
    items = int(input('Enter items sold: '))
    total += items
print('Total items sold:', total)
